title: epipactis purpurata var. pollinensis
intro: Epipactis purpurata var. pollinensis, also known as the Purple Helleborine or Pollinensis orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its extracts and compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Epipactis purpurata var. pollinensis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, improve cardiovascular health, and possess immunomodulatory properties. Traditionally, the herbal preparation of this plant is used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often consumed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
